name: User Account RID Modification via SAM Registry
description: Detects modifications to the Relative Identifier (RID) of user accounts in the Security Account Manager (SAM) registry. Such activity poses a significant risk as it can be used to escalate privileges or impersonate other accounts, potentially leading to unauthorized access and control over the system.

filterSets.name: User Account RID Modification via SAM Registry

author: Shaun Eris Galura
